name: Piercing Shot
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool, that on use, enhances your next critical attack used with any Rifle or Pistol. Enhanced critical attacks gain 100% chip damage and apply the Pierced Armor status effect to your opponent, increasing incoming PEN for a few seconds.
desc: Activate to make your next critical attack with any gun have 100% chip and shatter your opponent's armor for a few seconds, making them take increased PEN from all sources.
